paper_title: pCRISPR/Cas 9-mediated SlAMS knockout and mutation analysis

methods.description: Construction of a pCRISPR-SlAMS vector using a Cas9/gRNA plasmid construction kit for gene editing in tomato plants.

steps.description: Design the target gRNA sequence based on the cloned SlAMS gene sequence using an online CRISPR design tool.
steps.searchable_summary: design gRNA sequence using CRISPR design tool

steps.description: Design sense and anti-sense primers based on the target sequence and synthesize the oligomer.
steps.searchable_summary: design and synthesize primers for gRNA

steps.description: Insert the oligomer into the Cas9/gRNA vector and transform into E. coli DH 5α.
steps.searchable_summary: insert oligomer into vector and transform into E. coli

steps.description: Select and sequence colonies to identify positive clones using specific primers.
steps.searchable_summary: sequence colonies to identify positive clones

methods.description: Transformation of the pCRISPR-SlAMS vector into the tomato genome using Agrobacterium tumefaciens.

steps.description: Transform the identified pCRISPR-SlAMS vector into A. tumefaciens GV3101.
Use Agrobacterium-mediated method to transform the vector into the tomato genome.
steps.searchable_summary: transform vector into tomato genome using Agrobacterium

steps.description: Conduct three batches of Agrobacterium infection using cotyledons, comprising 80 ~ 100 explants in each batch.

methods.description: Analysis of mutations induced by the CRISPR/Cas9 system and cultivation of transgenic plants.

steps.description: Extract genomic DNA from T0 progeny regenerated plants using the CTAB method.
steps.searchable_summary: extract genomic DNA using CTAB method

steps.description: Detect transgenic plants via PCR amplification of the Npt II selection gene.
steps.searchable_summary: perform PCR to detect Npt II gene

steps.description: Sequence PCR products to confirm mutations.
steps.searchable_summary: sequence PCR products to confirm mutations

steps.description: Cultivate positive transgenic plants and untransformed wild type plants in the greenhouse until flowering.
steps.searchable_summary: cultivate plants in greenhouse until flowering
